blended.narrative: Stowe is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
